/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER PROBATION FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTYTO ALAMEDA COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO ALAMEDA COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL: SENTENCING/X: 2ND AMENDED INFORMATION IS FILED IN OPEN COURT, RECORDIS CORECTED TO CLARIFY THAT THE DEFENDANT PLED TO COUNTS 11, 16, AND 17,ALL CHARGES REMAIN AS FILED ON THE FIRST AMENDED INFORMATION ON 12-06-16/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 10 M/CTS:109/DNACOMP/IND/WS/WEAP/RX/RESTV/VF4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/X: AS TO COUNT 16, THE DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO 3 YEARS FORMAL PROBATION AND 109 DAYS IN COUNTY JAIL,/X: AS TO COUNT 17, THE DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO 109 DAYS IN COUNTY JAIL WITH CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED FOR 109 DAYS,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN DA: OFFICER COLIN RYAN/WIT SWORN DA: OFFICER JUAN LARA/WIT SWORN DA: SGT, THOMAS MCWILLIAMS/EXHMA:PEOPLES EXHIBIT 4-MAP OF 19TH STREET AND VERMONT AREA/EXHMA:PEOPLES EXHIBIT 5-CAD THE INCIDENT/EXHMA:DEFENSE EXHIBIT C-CD LABELED BODY CAM 1/EXHMA:PEOPLES EXHIBIT 7-PHOTO OF THE FIREARM FOUND IN THE BACK OF THE FRONT SEAT/EXHM:PEOPLESEXHIBIT 6-INCIDENT REPORT/EXHM:PEOPLES EXHIBIT 8-SFPD FIREARM REPORT/EXHM:PEOPLES EXHIBIT 9-OFFICERS LARA INCIDENT REPORT/EXHM:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 13-SFPD CHRON REPORT/X:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 10, CLETS QUERY FOR STOLEN FIREARM,HAVING BEEN PREVIOUSLY ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, IS NOW STRICKEN BY ORDER OFTHE COURT/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 11-CERTIFIED CLETS PRINTOUT OF ETHRIDGE'S WRAP SHEET/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 12- CERTIFIED DOJ FIREARMS RECORD/HTA1:1,2,3,4,7,8,10,11,13,16/871D:5,6,9,14,15,17,18,20/X:COUNT 19 IS CERTIFIED TO SUPERIOR COURT/X:ALL ALLEGATIONS AS TO COUNTS 1,3,4,5 AND 6 ARE FOUNDTO BE TRUE/BAIL:375000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/
